baseline.reason: The repository now has a uv-managed dependency environment; graph validation is the smallest checked-in health command.

lint.reason: Ruff is installed through the dev dependency group and currently checks the Python validator scripts.

build.reason: There is no package artifact yet; build is mapped to dependency-lock verification until source packaging exists.

plan-002-tests.reason: Runs Plan 002 behavior tests for the forkpoints feature without the live HUD/Modal integration case.

integration-forkpoint.reason: Runs the Plan 002 ForkPoint integration-readiness scenario that binds checked-in live-trace evidence to the capture/restore contract and records remaining real-system gaps.

plan-003-tests.reason: Runs Plan 003 witness contract tests for BranchRun records, promotion truth table, dedup, durable storage, replay gating, security policy, and Witness field completeness.

integration-witness.reason: Runs the Plan 003 live-integration preflight against the completed Plan 002 ForkPoint, Plan 004 controls, pinned harden-v0 dedup source, HUD CLI availability, and authoritative QA binding.

security-branch.reason: Runs the Plan 003 local branch-security policy preflight for denied secrets, denied egress, sibling isolation, trusted artifact writes, and trusted grader boundary.

plan-004-tests.reason: Plan 004 unit tests cover task identity, diversity, local grader success, freeze immutability, and Phase 2 manifest completeness.

integration-controls.reason: Materializes pinned task digests, verifies three sealed controls, runs nine HUD Docker baselines, and confirms the corrupt-control negative check.

plan-005-tests.reason: Blocked until release source/test paths exist after prior waves.

integration-release.reason: Blocked because harden-v0 is fetched and executable, but there is no v1/v2 grader, ProofSet runner, adapter, or publication target.

plan-006-tests.reason: Blocked until demo source/test paths exist after release proof artifacts.

demo.reason: Blocked until the 13-step demo report and underlying live/prior-run artifacts exist.

plan-007-tests.reason: Blocked until research source/test paths exist after core Witness creation.

integration-research.reason: Blocked until optional Memory/VM/depth-two capabilities are probed against real infrastructure.
